ocr_findings.description: Diagram label '②要件定義プロセス ユーザーのニーズをきく' connecting ユーザー and 情報システム部 is present in the image but not captured in OCR text. The diagram arrow labels are embedded in the figure and only partially recovered.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 05-07 content page covering 企画プロセスと要件定義プロセス. Main body text and headings are faithfully reproduced. The diagram with characters (経営者, ユーザー, 情報システム部, ベンダー) is represented by image placeholders; the label '②要件定義プロセス ユーザーのニーズをきく' on the horizontal arrow is missing from OCR but '①企画プロセス 経営上のニーズをきく' is captured. Minor cosmetic loss only.
